files.train_tf.py:
import tensorflow as tf

def train(model, x, y):
    dataset = tf.data.Dataset.from_tensor_slices((x, y)).batch(8)
    model.fit(dataset)

files.tf_side.py:
import tensorflow as tf

def train_tf(model, x, y):
    data = tf.data.Dataset.from_tensor_slices((x, y)).batch(4)
    model.fit(data)
